# Sebastian Moore

> AI governance and digital strategy specialist in the UK Civil Service. Senior Business Relationship Manager (Digital Business Partner) at HM Treasury. Named in HotTopics' Future CIO 100, the AI 100 UK by Digital Leaders and Apolitical's Government AI 100, and recognised as a Global Top 10 BRM by the BRM Institute. Author of the GOVBRM newsletter. Chairs the Civil Service Care-Experienced Network.

Sebastian Moore leads Business Relationship Management for HM Treasury's partner organisations, directing the Treasury Innovation Day and Digital Excellence Series. He grew up in care in County Durham and joined the Civil Service through the Care Leaver Internship Scheme. He writes on AI governance, digital transformation and business relationship management in UK government.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://sebastianmoore.co.uk/): Full profile - experience, credentials, education, recognition, research, events and contact details.
- [Writing, Research & Press](https://sebastianmoore.co.uk/publications.html): Published research, the GOVBRM newsletter, and press coverage.

## Key facts

- Role: Senior Business Relationship Manager (Digital Business Partner), HM Treasury
- Newsletter: GOVBRM - biweekly, 1,250+ readers, aligning public sector priorities with digital delivery through business relationship management
- Research: "How Apprenticeship Providers Underrepresent Care Leaver Eligibility" (SSRN, 2026), a systematic audit of 107 apprenticeship providers
- Recognition: Future CIO 100 (HotTopics, 2026), AI 100 UK (Digital Leaders, 2025), Government AI 100 (Apolitical, 2025), Global Top 10 BRM (BRM Institute, 2026), HM Treasury Innovation Award (2025)
- Advocacy: Chair, Civil Service Care-Experienced Network; care leaver from County Durham
